repo.description: Phoneme-Level BERT for Enhanced Prosody of Text-to-Speech with Grapheme Predictions

terms.context_snippet: > Large-scale pre-trained language models have been shown to be helpful in improving the naturalness of text-to-speech (TTS) models by enabling them to produce more naturalistic prosodic patterns. However, these models are usually word-level or sup-phoneme-level and jointly trai…
